calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-20-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an Adult and of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Diana Padilla.
Petitioner: Yan Ling Sun, present in pro per and as Guardia Ad Litem for the Minor: Feng Tain, and with Cantonese Interpreter: William Guan.
The minor's father/Co-Petitioner: Xiao Ping Tian, not present, but signed the Petition consenting to the name change of the Minor.
Petitioner and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Catherine Ling Sun, and grants the Change of Name of a Minor to: Fanny Alexandra Tian.
Decree signed in open court.
